notes: Quantization milestone features are all functioning correctly. 253 tests pass. The type checking and lint issues are minor and don't affect functionality. All 4 features (weight-quantization-engine, cli-quantize-command, kv-cache-quantization, layer-wise-loading) pass scrutiny review.
